---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Current courses — Université Rouen Normandie

All courses taught since September 2022 within the UFR DESP.

### Econometrics & quantitative methods

::: {.course}
#### Econometrics — L3
*Lecture (CM), 15h — mutualized across programs*
:::

::: {.course}
#### Applied Econometrics Projects — L3
*Tutorial (TD), 25h*
:::

::: {.course}
#### Econometrics III — M1 A2E
*Lecture (CM) 24h + Tutorial (TD) 12h*
:::

::: {.course}
#### Topics in Applied Microeconometrics — M2 A2E
*Lecture (CM), 20h*
:::

### Decision under uncertainty & public economics

::: {.course}
#### Economics of Risk and Uncertainty — M1 EEET
*Lecture (CM), 30h*
:::

::: {.course}
#### Public Decision under Uncertainty — M2 EEET
*Lecture (CM), 32h*
:::


## Previous positions

- **ATER** — Aix-Marseille School of Economics (AMSE)
- **ATER** — Université de Tours
- **ATER** — Université Paris-Est Créteil (UPEC)
